name: Kudos
description: Second first-party dogfood plugin. Lets a permitted user give kudos to a post, surfaces a community kudos total in the footer slot AND as a placeable layout widget, and adds a [kudos] content glyph. Exercises the module seams — listener, post.html filter, slot, layout widget, plugin migration, plugin setting, permission, route — through the public contract with zero core edits.
author: The NovFora Authors

permissions.label: Give kudos to a post
permissions.description: Lets the holder add a kudos to a post (one per user per post).
